name: CreateNodeInput
description: CreateNodeInput schema from Amazon Managed Blockchain API

allOf.description: A unique, case-sensitive identifier that you provide to ensure the idempotency of the operation. An idempotent operation completes no more than one time. This identifier is required only if you make a service request directly using an HTTP client. It is generated automatically if you use an Amazon Web Services SDK or the CLI.

The unique identifier of the member that owns this node.

Applies only to Hyperledger Fabric.
The properties of a node configuration.

Tags to assign to the node.

Each tag consists of a key and an optional value. You can specify multiple key-value pairs in a single request with an overall maximum of 50 tags allowed per resource.

For more information about tags, see Tagging Resources in the Amazon Managed Blockchain Ethereum Developer Guide, or Tagging Resources in the Amazon Managed Blockchain Hyperledger Fabric Developer Guide.
